title: Move volatile state out of registry.json into packagemanagerstate.json

todos.description: Verify TypeScript compiles cleanly (find tsc or use pi's build)
Audit index.ts for any remaining installedAt display/read from pkg directly
Smoke-test: install a package in dev mode and confirm registry.json has no volatile fields, packagemanagerstate.json has them

body:
## Goal
Registry.json must be git-syncable (no machine-local churn). All volatile/timestamp/flag fields move to ~/.pi/packagemanagerstate.json.

## Already Done
- constants.ts: added PackageState, ManagerState types + STATE_PATH; removed volatile fields from PackageEntry/Registry
- registry.ts: added loadState/saveState/getPackageState/setPackageState/removePackageState helpers; removePackage now cleans up state
- updates.ts: all lastUpdateCheck/updateAvailable reads+writes go through setPackageState/getPackageState
- git-pool.ts: poolLastUpdateCheck reads/writes go through loadState/saveState
- index.ts: addPackage calls stripped of volatile fields; setPackageState called after each install; display code reads updateAvailable from getPackageState()

## Remaining
- Verify TypeScript compiles cleanly
- Check if any display in index.ts shows installedAt (would need getPackageState too)
- Confirm registry.json written during tests contains no volatile fields
